name: Sword of Sharpness
entries: When you attack an object with this magic sword and hit, maximize your weapon damage dice against the target.
When you attack a creature with this weapon and roll a 20 on the attack roll, that target takes an extra {@damage 4d6} slashing damage.

variants.name: +1 Sword of Sharpness
entries: You gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this weapon.
